meaning: n.(北欧神话)洛基(冰霜巨人的后裔,火神)
examples: I am Loki, from Asgard, and I am burdened with glorious purpose.
Loki challenged them to make treasures equal to the three he had, not being willing to risk his personal safety.
In The Avengers, the all-star ensemble must thwart a possible world-ending scheme devised by Thor's villainous brother Loki.
The Welshman will compete with Loki Crichton and Joe Carlisle for the fly-half spot.
The usual Loki requirements of glibc 2.1 and the 2.2.x series Linux kernel still apply.
